# Change Agility — Tools

Practitioner tools across the seven Change Agility pillars. Each tool produces actionable output — a decision, a diagnosis, or a design input — not a report for its own sake.

## Live tools

These are built and available now. Click any to take the diagnostic.

### AI Knowledge Quick Quiz

12 questions. Quick gateway diagnostic — Know/Do/Build × 4 levels. Lightweight introduction before the full 7-dimension AI Mastery Self-Assessment.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/ai-mastery)**

`diagnostic` · Quick gateway diagnostic · Original — Gibbons 2026 · v0.5 · *Master the Craft*
---
### Cynefin Domain Diagnostic

7 questions, live quadrant reading, turbulence dial.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/cynefin)**

`diagnostic` · Established framework · Snowden & Boone (2007) · Items original · v0.4 · *Embrace Complexity*
---
### Human Flourishing at Work (PERMA)

15 statements across PERMA dimensions.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/human-flourishing)**

`diagnostic` · Established framework · Seligman PERMA (2011) · Items © Gibbons · Educational use · *Put People First*
---
### Ikigai Diagnostic

12 statements. Love/Good At/World Needs/Paid For.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/ikigai)**

`diagnostic` · Japanese ikigai tradition · Items © Paul Gibbons (Spirituality of Work and Leadership) · Reflective use · *Put People First*
---
### AI Mastery Self-Assessment

A 21-question behavioral self-assessment across 7 dimensions — Civics, Metacognition, Ethics, Concepts, Skills, Creativity, and Orchestration. Produces a scored mastery profile with radar chart and downloadable development brief. Browser-only, no data stored.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/ai-mastery-assessment)**

`ai-tool` · Structured self-assessment · AI Mastery Framework · Original — Gibbons 2026 · v0.1 · *Master the Craft*
---

## In development

Active build, not yet visible on the live site.

- **Wicked Problem Mapper** — Map interconnected problems, stakeholders, constraints for AI adoption. *(`interactive-tool`, Embrace Complexity)*
- **Psychological Safety Index** — Reframed for AI: do people feel safe admitting they don't understand the AI? *(`diagnostic`, Consciously Manage Trust)*
- **Change Impact Assessment** — Who's affected, how, what support needed? *(`canvas`, Put People First)*
- **Stakeholder Empathy Map** — What do stakeholders think, feel, say, do about AI? *(`canvas`, Put People First)*
- **Nudge Audit** — What choice architecture exists around AI adoption? *(`canvas`, Prioritize Behavior)*
- **Ethical Dilemma Scenario Cards** — 20 scenario cards for leadership workshops. *(`workshop-tool`, Manage Ethics Always)*

## Long list

Tools we intend to build (planned) or are evaluating (speculative). See the [full long list](/tools/long-list/) for cross-domain view.

- **Team Capability Heatmap** — Manager-facing. Map your team across User→Architect. *(planned · Master the Craft)*
- **PKM Maturity Diagnostic** — 6 levels: Chaos → One Box → Linked Thinking → Working Memory → Augmented Intelligence → Institutional Brain. *(planned · Master the Craft)*
- **Sensemaking Diagnostic** — Surfaces the narratives beneath stated objections. *(planned · Embrace Complexity)*
- **AI Trust Calibration Quick-Check** — Over-trusting or under-trusting? 6 questions. *(planned · Consciously Manage Trust)*
- **Assumption Mapper** — Surface and test assumptions about the AI tool, users, and process. *(planned · Design and Prototype)*
- **Pilot Design Template** — Scope, success criteria, timeline, kill criteria, scale-up triggers. *(planned · Design and Prototype)*
- **Behavioral Intervention Selector** — Given CMTO diagnosis, which of 9 intervention types to use? *(planned · Prioritize Behavior)*
- **Loss Aversion Mapper** — Map perceived losses from AI adoption. *(planned · Prioritize Behavior)*
- **Defaults Audit** — Is AI opt-in or opt-out in your org? *(planned · Prioritize Behavior)*
- **Behavioral Design Sprint** — Define target behavior → barriers → intervention type → design → test → measure. *(planned · Prioritize Behavior)*
- **Ladder of Inference Diagnostic** — Most AI resistance lives at the assumption layer. *(planned · Prioritize Behavior)*
- **MINDSPACE Audit** — 9 influences on behavior applied to AI adoption. *(planned · Prioritize Behavior)*
- **AI Bias Audit Template** — Identify where bias enters, who's harmed, what to test. *(planned · Manage Ethics Always)*
- **Cognitive Bias Audit for AI** — Automation bias, anchoring, confirmation bias in AI decision-making. *(planned · Manage Ethics Always)*
- **Adoption Friction Mapper** — Process-level tool that maps where users disengage in an AI adoption journey, where workarounds emerge, and where value leaks. Combines user journey mapping with behavioural observation. Distinct from CMTO (id 22) which is the four-factor diagnostic. *(planned · Prioritize Behavior)*
- *Tool Stack Audit* — What AI tools does your org actually use vs. sanctioned vs. shadow AI? *(speculative · Master the Craft)*
- *Prompt Engineering Maturity Quiz* — 5-min quiz. Are you copy-pasting or system-prompting? *(speculative · Master the Craft)*
- *AI Learning Concierge* — Personalized learning plan from vetted sources. *(speculative · Master the Craft)*
- *Complexity Radar* — Where are you pretending it's simple? *(speculative · Embrace Complexity)*
- *Dependency Network Visualizer* — Map technical + human dependencies. *(speculative · Embrace Complexity)*
- *Displacement Risk Calculator* — Role-by-role task automation analysis. *(speculative · Put People First)*
- *MVP Readiness Checklist* — Before you pilot: data ready? Users identified? Rollback plan? *(speculative · Design and Prototype)*
- *Habit Formation Tracker* — Track adoption behaviors over 30/60/90 days. *(speculative · Prioritize Behavior)*
- *Social Proof Dashboard* — Make AI use visible, celebrated, normal. *(speculative · Prioritize Behavior)*
- *Responsible AI Maturity Checklist* — Aspirational → embedded maturity curve. *(speculative · Manage Ethics Always)*
